case_title: DESMOND CONNER VS. MARK KALOGRIS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNER, DESMOND SERVED MAY-18-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KALOGRIS, MARK

REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNER, DESMOND JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-13-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT MARK KALOGRIS' NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE SET FOR 6/22/09 IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MARK KALOGRIS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. MARK KALOGRIS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF MARK KALOGRIS ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
